channel.title: The Cottagecore Botanical Journal
channel.description: The Cottagecore Botanical Journal -- cottagecore and botanical living ideas.

item.title: How to Safely Identify and Forage Glowing Fungi in the Wild
item.description: Learn how to safely identify and forage bioluminescent fungi in the wild, including how to avoid poisonous look-alikes.

item.title: Glowing Fungi & Stardust Lichen Products for Your Summer Sanctuary
item.description: Discover curated glowing fungi and stardust lichen products to bring magical forest beauty into your summer space.

item.title: Summer Cottagecore Essentials: Curated Botanical Products for Your Cozy Space
item.description: Discover dreamy cottagecore-inspired products that bring nature's beauty into your summer space with soft pastels and vintage botanicals.

item.title: Curated Cottagecore Botanical Products for Your Summer Space
item.description: Discover vintage-inspired botanical products to enhance your summer cottagecore aesthetic with soft pastels and nature-inspired decor.

item.title: Cottagecore-Inspired Products to Elevate Your Summer Space
item.description: Discover curated cottagecore products to bring nature's beauty into your summer space with soft pastels and vintage botanicals.

item.title: Curated Vintage Botanical Products for the Cottagecore Summer
item.description: Discover a curated collection of vintage botanical-inspired products to embrace the dreamy cottagecore aesthetic this summer.
